intro.p1: I'm José Arbelaez. I work with data, machine learning, and artificial intelligence. This is my space to write about what I learn, what I think, and what keeps me curious.
intro.p2: I'm interested in understanding how things work — from language models to the decisions we make when designing systems. I write to think better.

articles_page.title: Articles
articles_page.subtitle: Reflections, learnings, and notes on AI, data, and technology.
articles_page.no_articles_subtitle: Check my articles in Spanish for now :)

meta.site_description: Reflections and learnings on artificial intelligence, data, and technology.
